station_note: Open-sea ISPRA tide gauge on the south breakwater of Bocca di Porto del Lido, Adriatic side. Distinct from the Faro Rocchetta lagoon-side station (south of Lido) — do not conflate. The 'faro' suffix in the source archive name refers to the lighthouse on the Diga Sud breakwater itself, not Faro Rocchetta.
datum_note: PRESERVED. Source values are metres above ZMPS. Cache stores level_cm = level_m * 100. No vertical transform applied.
time: ora_solare = fixed UTC+1, no DST. Timestamps naive.
